stories.title: **Headline:** Yordan Alvarez Leads MLB in 8 Offensive Categories — "The Closest I've Seen to Barry Bonds"

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Yordan Alvarez leads MLB in: ⚾

HRs (11) • RBIs (26) • Hits (33)
XBH (19) • Total Bases (74)
OBP (.466) • SLG (.779) • OPS (1.245)

That's 8 offensive categories.

His teammate Carlos Correa: "2026 Yordan is the closest I've seen to Barry Bonds."

#Astros #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Yordan Alvarez's 11th HR: 108.8 mph. 422 feet. 2-run shot. ⚾

Tied Lance Berkman for most HRs in Astros franchise history through 26 games.

Batting .347 on an 8-game hit streak. Leads MLB in 8 categories.

The best start to an MLB season in a decade.

#Astros #MLB

article.headline: Yordan Alvarez Leads MLB in 8 Offensive Categories — Teammate Compares Him to Barry Bonds

stories.title: **Headline:** Murakami Hits 10th HR in 24th Career Game — 5-Game Streak Tied for Longest by MLB Rookie All-Time

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami just hit his 10th HR of 2026. ⚾

In his 24th career MLB game.

Most by any Japanese-born player through that threshold.
Surpassing Ohtani, who had 6 through his first 24.

5 straight games with a HR — tied for the longest ever by an MLB rookie.

#WhiteSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Chicago's new rookie tandem is historic. ⚾

Murakami: 10 HRs (24 career games)
Montgomery: 6 HRs

No White Sox rookie duo has looked like this in decades.

The rebuild is showing up in the box score.

#WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Murakami Hits 10th HR in 24th Career Game — White Sox Rookie Sets Japanese-Born MLB Record

stories.title: **Headline:** Yankees Complete Fenway Sweep — Improve to 16-9 as AL East's Best

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Yankees just swept Fenway. ⚾

4-0 (Stanton HR + 2-run double)
4-1 (Max Fried 8 scoreless innings)
Game 3 complete.

New York: 16-9. AL-best. 5-game win streak.
Boston: 9-16. 7 games back. AL East last.

Statement series.

#Yankees #RedSox #MLB

article.headline: Yankees Sweep Red Sox at Fenway — Improve to AL-Best 16-9 on Five-Game Win Streak

stories.title: **Headline:** Shohei Ohtani's 53-Game On-Base Streak Ended — Where Does It Rank in History?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ohtani's 53-game on-base streak ended Tuesday. ⚾

Started Aug 24, 2025 — crossed an offseason.
Tied Shawn Green for 2nd in Dodgers history.
5 short of Duke Snider's record (58, 1954).
Longest ever by a Japanese-born player.

He pitched 6 IP, 7 K the same night.

#Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Ohtani's 53-Game On-Base Streak Ends — Where Does It Rank in MLB History?

stories.title: **Headline:** NL Central: All Five Teams Over .500 — MLB's Most Competitive Division

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Every team in the NL Central is above .500. ⚾

Reds: 15-8
Pirates: 13-9
Cubs: 13-9
Cardinals: 13-9
Brewers: 12-9

The Brewers are in LAST PLACE with a winning record.
They'd lead most other divisions right now.

Best division in baseball.

#MLB #NLCentral

article.headline: All Five NL Central Teams Are Over .500 — Baseball's Most Competitive Division Has No Floor

stories.title: **Headline:** Nick Kurtz Draws Walk in 13 Straight Games — Tied for 4th in A's History

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Nick Kurtz has drawn a walk in 13 straight games. ⚾

That ties Mickey Cochrane (1929) for the 4th-longest such streak in A's franchise history.

The 2024 No. 2 overall pick is quietly one of the best stories in baseball right now.

#Athletics #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** MLB Power Rankings April 24 — Dodgers Hold No. 1, NL Central Dominance Recognized

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
MLB Power Rankings (April 20): ⚾

No. 1: Dodgers (16-7)
4 of 5 NL Central teams in the top 10.

Most complete division in baseball.
Dodgers are the class of the league.

But the Astros offense and White Sox rookies are making noise.

#MLB #PowerRankings
